data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the persona scenario regarding the audit trail between 'AI agent' and human actor. However, there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this requirement has been implemented or validated. The linked use cases and prior steps focus on booking processes and configurations that do not pertain to the specific audit trail scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of audit trail validation between AI agent and human actor.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the audit trail functionality.
